{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Forged claws
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Naian]] grows [[Forged claws]] of red-and-black from his fingers.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
